creator: vsync@quadium.net
text:
I have a 1GB Creative MuVo TX FM which works perfectly in 6.1-RELEASE.  However in 6.2-RELEASE, or -STABLE, the umass driver attaches but a "da" device never appears.  Eventually (or as soon as I unplug the player) I got a lot of BBB errors, as follows:

umass2: CREATIVE MuVo TX FM, rev 2.00/12.02, addr 9
umass2: BBB reset failed, STALLED
umass2: BBB bulk-in clear stall failed, STALLED
umass2: BBB bulk-out clear stall failed, STALLED
umass2: BBB reset failed, STALLED
umass2: BBB bulk-in clear stall failed, STALLED
umass2: BBB bulk-out clear stall failed, STALLED
umass2: BBB reset failed, STALLED
umass2: BBB bulk-in clear stall failed, STALLED
umass2: BBB bulk-out clear stall failed, STALLED
umass2: BBB reset failed, STALLED
[...]
